description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a modern, angular design and a matte dark finish. The slide features a series of serrations along the top for improved grip and manipulation, and the frame is constructed with a prominent trigger guard and a straight, ergonomic grip. The grip appears to be made of a different, possibly polymer material, contrasting with the metallic slide and frame. The barrel is integrated into the slide, with no visible external threading or compensator. The overall silhouette is compact, with clean lines and minimal embellishments, suggesting a utilitarian, tactical style. There are no visible manufacturer markings, logos, or serial numbers on the slide or frame.
description: A modern, compact semi-automatic handgun with a matte dark finish, angular slide serrations, and a straight ergonomic grip. The design is clean and utilitarian, with minimal external markings.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the slide, grip, and trigger guard, highlighting the angular design and slide serrations.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slide serrations and the flat, wide profile of the handgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and slide contours.
description_view_3: Front-on view showing the muzzle opening and the width of the slide and grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is straight and rectangular with a smooth, slightly glossy surface, likely made of polymer. It lacks visible texturing, finger grooves, or checkering, giving it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance. The grip is visually distinct from the metallic slide, providing a subtle contrast in color and finish. No logos, embellishments, or ergonomic contours are present, resulting in a simple, functional design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, angular, and robust, with a squared-off front edge and a thick profile. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame, providing ample space for finger placement. There are no visible undercuts, texturing, or accessory rails, and the design is plain and functional.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is fully enclosed within the slide, with a standard, non-threaded muzzle. It has a short, compact profile with no visible porting, fluting, or compensator. The exterior finish matches the matte appearance of the slide, and there are no visible markings or embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is smooth and unadorned, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extension, bevel, or finger rest. The design is simple and unembellished, matching the utilitarian style of the handgun.
